rationale: CS & AI at level-3 is where the ML community's identity granularity actually lives. NeurIPS authors write 'I work on LLM alignment' or 'I do diffusion models for video', not 'I do machine learning'. Forty leaves split nearly half-and-half between the ML cluster (LLMs, diffusion, RL, theory, etc.) and the systems cluster (databases, OS, security, etc.). I separated foundation-model topics (training, scaling, eval, alignment) as their own leaves because that's how the field is organized today — arXiv's cs.LG no longer captures the granularity authors care about.

subfields.name: Deep Learning Architectures
subfields.tagline: Transformers, MoE, SSMs, hybrid architectures, scaling.

subfields.name: Foundation Model Training & Scaling
subfields.tagline: Pre-training methods, data, scaling laws, post-training.

subfields.name: Reinforcement Learning
subfields.tagline: Policy gradient, model-based RL, RLHF, multi-agent RL.

subfields.name: Generative Modeling
subfields.tagline: Diffusion models, flow matching, VAEs, score-based models.

subfields.name: ML Theory & Optimization
subfields.tagline: Optimization theory, generalization, NTK, in-context learning theory.

subfields.name: Self-Supervised & Representation Learning
subfields.tagline: Contrastive, masked modeling, representation analysis.

subfields.name: Graph Neural Networks & Geometric DL
subfields.tagline: GNNs, geometric deep learning, equivariant networks.

subfields.name: Efficient ML & Model Compression
subfields.tagline: Quantization, pruning, distillation, LoRA-style adaptation.

subfields.name: LLM Evaluation & Benchmarks
subfields.tagline: Capability evals, contamination, holistic eval frameworks.

subfields.name: LLM Reasoning & Agents
subfields.tagline: Chain-of-thought, tool use, autonomous agents, agentic eval.

subfields.name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
subfields.tagline: RAG architectures, long-context retrieval, agentic retrieval.

subfields.name: Multilingual & Low-Resource NLP
subfields.tagline: Cross-lingual transfer, low-resource modeling, language diversity.

subfields.name: Machine Translation
subfields.tagline: Neural MT, simultaneous, speech-to-text translation.

subfields.tagline: Text-to-image, image editing, personalization, world models.

subfields.name: Robot Learning & Policy
subfields.tagline: Imitation learning, sim-to-real, foundation policies, manipulation learning.

subfields.name: Embodied AI & Vision-Language-Action
subfields.tagline: VLA models, embodied benchmarks, internet-scale robot data.

subfields.name: SLAM, Perception & Mapping
subfields.tagline: Visual-inertial SLAM, semantic mapping, robot perception stacks.

subfields.name: Alignment Methods & RLHF
subfields.tagline: RLHF, DPO and successors, preference learning, scalable oversight.

subfields.name: Mechanistic Interpretability
subfields.tagline: Circuits, SAEs, feature analysis, model internals.

subfields.name: AI Evals & Red-Teaming
subfields.tagline: Dangerous-capability evals, jailbreaks, red-team methodology.

subfields.name: Distributed Systems & Cloud
subfields.tagline: Distributed consensus, cloud orchestration, serverless.

subfields.name: ML Systems & Infrastructure
subfields.tagline: Training/serving systems, model parallelism, inference serving.

subfields.name: Operating Systems & Storage
subfields.tagline: OS internals, storage systems, file systems, persistent memory.

subfields.name: Networks & Protocols
subfields.tagline: Datacenter networks, congestion control, programmable networks.

subfields.name: Applied Cryptography & Post-Quantum
subfields.tagline: Practical crypto, PQC standardization, lattice-based, MPC, FHE.

subfields.name: Systems & Network Security
subfields.tagline: Hardware/OS attacks, network defenses, side channels, firmware.

subfields.name: Privacy & Anonymization
subfields.tagline: Differential privacy, deanonymization, federated learning privacy.

subfields.name: Complexity Theory
subfields.tagline: Hardness, fine-grained complexity, circuit complexity, PCP.

subfields.name: Algorithm Design & Analysis
subfields.tagline: Approximation algorithms, sublinear algorithms, online algorithms.

subfields.name: Formal Verification & Model Checking
subfields.tagline: Verified software, model checking, SMT, proof assistants.

subfields.name: Compilers & Programming Language Design
subfields.tagline: Type systems, compiler optimization, language design, ML compilers.

subfields.name: Database Systems & ML4DB
subfields.tagline: Query optimization, ML-for-systems, vector databases.

subfields.name: AR/VR/XR & Spatial Interaction
subfields.tagline: Spatial interfaces, AR/VR systems, mixed reality interaction.

subfields.name: HCI of AI & Generative Interfaces
subfields.tagline: AI copilots interaction design, generative-UI, trust and oversight.

subfields.name: Scientific ML & Neural PDEs
subfields.tagline: Neural PDE solvers, operator learning, ML surrogates for physics.

subfields.name: ML for Chemistry & Materials Discovery
subfields.tagline: Generative models for molecules, materials property prediction, autonomous labs.

subfields.name: ML for Biology
subfields.tagline: Protein foundation models, biology-specific generative models, evo design.

subfields.name: Computer Architecture
subfields.tagline: ISAs, memory hierarchies, accelerators, GPUs, energy-efficient computing.

subfields.name: Embedded & Cyber-Physical Systems
subfields.tagline: Embedded ML, IoT, automotive/aerospace CPS, edge computing — RTOS, FPGA, real-time scheduling.

subfields.name: Computer Graphics
subfields.tagline: Ray tracing, animation, VR/AR rendering, generative graphics — rendering, geometry processing, physically based simulation.

subfields.name: Scientific Visualization & Visual Analytics
subfields.tagline: Scivis, infovis, dashboards, visual analytics for ML — visualization design, perceptual evaluation.

subfields.name: Computer Ethics, Policy & Governance
subfields.tagline: AI governance, platform regulation, surveillance, professional ethics.

subfields.name: Digital Inclusion, Accessibility & CS Education
subfields.tagline: Accessibility, digital divides, CS education, assistive tech — HCI studies, participatory design, learning analytics.

uncovered_concerns: Computer Architecture & Hardware L2 has no L3 leaves at this depth — papers fold under ML Systems & Infrastructure for accelerators, and EE leaves for chip design.
Graphics & Visualization L2 has no L3 leaves — its papers fold under 3D Vision & Neural Rendering, generative imaging, or HCI.
Computing & Society L2 has no L3 leaves — small at L3 depth; folds under AI Safety leaves or under Social Sciences L1.
Could split LLM training between 'pre-training' and 'post-training' as separate L3 leaves — the post-training community is large enough; merged for now.
